MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
Judge Pro Tem: Jason Jungreis; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported. (Dept. 304-B).
Appearances:
Richard Beckman, Esq. for and with the plaintiff Kaan Ting.
Defendant, Horrace Perro, Jr., is present.
Erlich Law, Esq., representing the defendant Horrace Perro, Jr. through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.
This case did NOT settle.
